easy.title: Style Specific Elements with Selectors
easy.description: Given the HTML, use CSS selectors to: (1) Make h1 blue, (2) Make .highlight paragraphs yellow, (3) Make #special bold and italic. Do not change the HTML.

This should be yellow

This should be bold and italic

This should be normal

medium.title: Create a Zebra-Striped Nested List
medium.description: Style a nested list so that: (1) Top-level items are bold, (2) Even top-level items have a gray background, (3) Nested items are normal weight with italic text.
medium.starterCode:
• Section A
    • Item 1
    • Item 2
  • Section B
    • Item 3
    • Item 4
  • Section C
    • Item 5
    • Item 6

    • Item 2
  • Section B
    • Item 3
    • Item 4
  • Section C

    • Item 6

hard.title: Build a Style System Using Advanced Selectors
hard.description: Create a blog page style system that uses at least 6 different selector types: element selectors for base typography, class selectors for components, ID selectors for layout sections, combinators for navigation, attribute selectors for external links, and pseudo-classes for interactive states.
